summary: Successfully tested the Edit Job Card modal functionality. All fields are present and working correctly - Customer Information section, Vehicle Information section (Registration Number, Brand, Model, Year, Kilometers Driven), and Service Details section (Service Number, Service Date, Service Type, Amount, Description). Changes are saved and persisted correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Edit Job Card modal is well-organized with 3 sections: Customer Information, Vehicle Information, Service Details
handleEditJobCard function correctly populates all form fields from the selected job card
handleSaveEdit function properly sends service_date in ISO format and kms_driven as integer
All fields are editable and changes are persisted via PUT /api/services/{id} endpoint
Table refreshes automatically after save via fetchAllData() call
Success toast 'Job card updated successfully!' appears after save
seed_data_creation: Modified JOB-000325 (Praveen Kumar G) during testing: Vehicle Brand changed to HONDA, Vehicle Model to Jupiter 125 Pro, Service Date to 2025-01-15, Amount to 2500
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Job Card modal is fully functional. All fields from Job Card Details are now available in the Edit modal organized in 3 sections. The modal opens by clicking the Edit button (pencil icon) on a job card row. Changes are saved via PUT /api/services/{id} endpoint and the table refreshes automatically.

features_tested: Navigate to Services -> Job Cards tab - PASSED
Click the Edit icon on a job card to open the Edit Job Card modal - PASSED
Verify the Edit modal has all fields organized in sections: Customer Information, Vehicle Information, Service Details - PASSED
Verify Vehicle Information section includes: Registration Number, Vehicle Brand, Vehicle Model, Vehicle Year, Kilometers Driven - PASSED
Verify Service Details section includes: Service Number, Service Date, Service Type, Amount, Complaint/Description - PASSED
Change the Vehicle Brand to a new value and save - PASSED
Verify the change reflects in the Job Cards table immediately - PASSED
Change the Service Date to a new date and save - PASSED
Verify the date change is persisted - PASSED
Test editing multiple fields at once and verify all changes are saved correctly - PASSED

ui_tests.modal_opens: PASSED - Edit Job Card modal opens on Edit button click
ui_tests.sections_present: PASSED - Customer Information, Vehicle Information, Service Details sections present
ui_tests.all_fields_present: PASSED - All required fields are present and editable
ui_tests.save_functionality: PASSED - Save Changes button works and shows success toast
ui_tests.table_refresh: PASSED - Table refreshes automatically after save
ui_tests.data_persistence: PASSED - Changes are persisted in database
